source_pr.title: tests, planner: migrate tests for indexmerge_path, integration and partition in planner
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #47329

Problem Summary:

Move the tests in `indexmerge_path`, `integration`, `integration_partition` and `partition_pruner` to integration tests.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->  

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Plan-cache/lease/background refresh can introduce timing-dependent behavior. This PR stabilizes it by: - // The output might be unstable.

evidence: evidence: - // The output might be unstable.

files: planner/core/BUILD.bazel, planner/core/indexmerge_path_test.go, planner/core/integration_partition_test.go, planner/core/integration_test.go, planner/core/partition_pruner_test.go, planner/core/testdata/index_merge_suite_in.json, planner/core/testdata/index_merge_suite_out.json, tests/integrationtest/r/black_list.result, tests/integrationtest/r/expression/issues.result, tests/integrationtest/r/planner/core/indexmerge_path.result, tests/integrationtest/r/planner/core/integration.result, tests/integrationtest/r/planner/core/integration_partition.result, tests/integrationtest/r/planner/core/partition_pruner.result, tests/integrationtest/t/black_list.test, tests/integrationtest/t/expression/issues.test, tests/integrationtest/t/planner/core/indexmerge_path.test, tests/integrationtest/t/planner/core/integration.test, tests/integrationtest/t/planner/core/integration_partition.test, tests/integrationtest/t/planner/core/partition_pruner.test
